rules.title: Shellshock Expression
rules.description: Detects shellshock expressions in log files

rules.title: Webshell ReGeorg Detection Via Web Logs
rules.condition_summary: selection exclusion filter and exclusion filter
rules.description: Certain strings in the uri_query field when combined with null referer and null user agent can indicate activity associated with the webshell ReGeorg.

rules.title: Suspicious ASPX File Drop by Exchange
rules.description: Detects suspicious file type dropped by an Exchange component in IIS into a suspicious folder

rules.title: Suspicious MSExchangeMailboxReplication ASPX Write
rules.description: Detects suspicious activity in which the MSExchangeMailboxReplication process writes .asp and .apsx files to disk, which could be a sign of ProxyShell exploitation

rules.title: Suspicious Child Process Of SQL Server
rules.condition_summary: selection exclusion filter excluding 1 of filter_optional_*
rules.description: Detects suspicious child processes of the SQLServer process. This could indicate potential RCE or SQL Injection.
